DESCRIPTION:
Test Case:
All tab metadata (tabs, active tab, breadcrumbs)
is fully restored after page refresh

Objective:
Verify that after browser refresh:
- All tabs are restored
- Active tab remains the same
- Breadcrumbs are preserved
- Tab IDs/titles remain intact

Expected:
- Tabs A, B, C restored correctly
- Tab B remains active
- Breadcrumb restored correctly
NAME: test_tab_metadata_restored_after_refresh

DESCRIPTION:
Test Case:
TUU-T796 - Save Search – Unique Name / Blank Name / Special Characters

Objective:
Verify that:
1. User can save search with unique name
2. Blank search name validation appears
3. Special character validation works correctly

Expected:
1. New tab saved successfully
2. Validation shown for blank name
3. Validation shown or special chars sanitized
NAME: test_save_search_validations

DESCRIPTION:
Test Case:
TUU-T793 - Saved Search Tab Applies Filters & Updates Table

Objective:
Verify that:
- Clicking a saved search tab applies filters
- Table data updates correctly
- Filter state is reflected in the UI

Expected:
- Filters applied instantly
- Table updates based on saved search criteria
NAME: test_saved_search_tab_applies_filters_updates_table

DESCRIPTION:

DESCRIPTION: Verify user is successfully logged out after clicking Sign out.
NAME: test_signout_successfully

DESCRIPTION:
Verify clicking an order search suggestion navigates
to the correct order detail page.
NAME: test_verify_order_search_suggestion_navigation

DESCRIPTION:
Test Case:
Tab order is reflected correctly in UI after multiple reorders

Objective:
Verify that:
- Multiple drag-and-drop reorder operations work correctly
- Tab bar always reflects latest logical order
- No tabs disappear or duplicate during reordering

Expected:
- UI order updates correctly after every drag
- All tabs remain visible
- No duplicate/missing tabs
NAME: test_multiple_tab_reorders_reflect_correct_ui_order

DESCRIPTION: Verify designated customer fields are read-only.

1. Sidebar navigation

Verify all mandatory columns are visible and
Customer ID is clickable.
NAME: test_customer_list_accessible_via_sidebar_and_quick_search

DESCRIPTION:
Test Case:
Switching tabs updates breadcrumb
to match the newly active tab

Objective:
Verify that:
- Each tab maintains independent breadcrumb state
- Switching tabs updates breadcrumb immediately
- Breadcrumb matches active tab context

Expected:
- Tab A shows breadcrumb: Home > A
- Tab B shows breadcrumb: Home > B
- Breadcrumb updates correctly on tab switch
NAME: test_breadcrumb_updates_on_tab_switch
